name: F13-flask-api
scenario: Flask todo REST API + 2 parallel improves (tags, priority). Real LLM-built code.

comparison_with_P6_F13.note: F13 scales correctly with conflict complexity. Flask conflicts were smaller (REST endpoints) than P6's CLI (deep schema/migration coupling) → smaller conflicts → faster + cheaper.

key_finding: F13 works on real LLM-built code in a different domain (web API vs CLI). Same architecture, same model, no special tuning. Ships safely.
earlier_run_failure: First attempt failed with rc=1 / 0s due to .watcher2.log being untracked (the bench script wrote to a non-standard filename not covered by setup_gitignore). Fixed in script. Re-ran successfully with .watcher.log cleaned up; the salvage merge itself worked correctly.
